description: Composition Green ethnic print kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, round neck, printed border panel on the sleeve hems, printed panel extending from the neckline to the bust that has bead detailing, mock placket and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by aurelia is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look, or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5'7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
